channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Millipedes beat vertebrates to land by 80 million years
item.description: Millipedes may have crawled on land nearly 460 million years ago, long before vertebrates arrived, a new study finds.

item.title: Scientists discover parrots may actually use names
item.description: Parrots may do more than mimic—they might use names, according to researchers who analyzed hundreds of recordings.

item.title: Yellowstone wolves may not have reshaped the national park after all
item.description: One of the most celebrated claims about Yellowstone's wolves is facing a major challenge. Scientists say the study behind the famous trophic cascade s...

item.title: A dying star could create a new universe instead of a black hole
item.description: What if some black holes aren't black holes at all? A new theoretical study suggests that when a massive star collapses, it might not form a singulari...
